scripts.deploy:web: /usr/local/bin/docker compose build --build-arg VITE_BUILD_ID=$(date +%y%m%d%H%M)$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/-/ ') --build-arg VITE_BUILD_TIME="$(date)" sori-web && /usr/local/bin/docker compose up -d sori-web
scripts.deploy:backend: /usr/local/bin/docker compose build sori-backend && /usr/local/bin/docker compose up -d sori-backend
scripts.deploy:all: /usr/local/bin/docker compose build --build-arg VITE_BUILD_ID=$(date +%y%m%d%H%M)$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/-/ ') --build-arg VITE_BUILD_TIME="$(date)" && /usr/local/bin/docker compose up -d
